meaning: Japan Standard Time 日本标准时间
examples: Conclusions: JST exerted obvious ameliorative effect on renal function and structure in diabetic rats.
To observe the ameliorative effect of Jishentang (JST) on renal lesions in experimental diabetic rats.
Then download Web Tools Platform (WTP, JST, and WST combined), with a file name something like wtp-R-1.5.4.zip.
